zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey於大約1035年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利貝倫可姆時，他的父親Ranulph de Warenne45歲，母親Beatrix de Vascoeuil12歲。他於1077年與Gundred de St Omer在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1040年住在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1088年6月24日在英國英格蘭素可列維斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey于大约1035年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利貝倫可姆时，他的父亲Ranulph de Warenne45岁，母亲Beatrix de Vascoeuil12岁。他于1077年与Gundred de St Omer在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1040年住在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1088年6月24日在英国英格兰素可列維斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey was born about 1035, in Bellencombre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Ranulph de Warenne, was 45 and his mother, Beatrix de Vascoeuil, was 12. He married Gundred de St Omer in 1077, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France in 1040. He registered for military service in 1066. He died on 24 June 1088, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey est né environ 1035, à Bellencombre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Ranulph de Warenne, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Vascoeuil, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Gundred de St Omer en 1077, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France en 1040. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1088, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Priory Lewes, Lewes, Sussex, England: Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey um 1035 in Bellencombre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Warenne 45 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Vascoeuil 12. Er hat 1077 in Normandie, Frankreich Gundred de St Omer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1040 hat er in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich gelebt. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. Juni 1088 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey è nato il circa 1035 nel Bellencombre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ranulph de Warenne, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Vascoeuil, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Gundred de St Omer nel 1077, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia nel 1040. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì il 24 giugno 1088, nel Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surreyが約1035年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメベレンコンブアで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Warenneは45歳，母Beatrix de Vascoeuilは12歳であった。1077年にフランスノーマンディでGundred de St Omerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1040年にはフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメに住んでいた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1088年6月24日にイギリスイギリススセックスルスで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスルスルス スト ジョン ウィソウトにて埋葬された。

ko.Priory Lewes, Lewes, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트
ko.lifeSummary: William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 벨렌코브르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Warenne(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Vascoeuil(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1077년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Gundred de St Omer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1040년도에 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 살았다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1088년 6월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트에 묻혔다.

pt.Priory Lewes, Lewes, Sussex, England: Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Bellencombre, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulph de Warenne, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Vascoeuil, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Gundred de St Omer em 1077, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França em 1040. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1088, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Priory Lewes, Lewes, Sussex, England: львесь ст джон витоут, львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey родился около 1035 г. в местности белленкомбр, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Warenne было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Vascoeuil, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Gundred de St Omer в 1077 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в 1040 году. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 июня 1088 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь ст джон витоут, львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Gundred de St Omer en 1077, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia en 1040. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió el 24 de junio de 1088, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
